# Syntax Studio

> Oslo-based creative and marketing studio building websites, video and ad campaigns for businesses that want measurable results. One team handles strategy, production and delivery, so clients work with a single point of contact instead of coordinating multiple agencies. Bilingual (Norwegian and English), works internationally.

## By the numbers

- **100M+ NOK** in combined 2025 annual revenue across clients Syntax Studio has worked with
- **20 client projects delivered** in 2026 to date
- **516,000 social media views** generated in April 2026 (month-to-date) across accounts managed by Syntax Studio
- **~400,000 of those views** from video content produced 100% in-house by Syntax Studio
- Based in **Oslo, Norway**, with delivered international projects

## What we do
- Websites and landing pages, custom-built, no templates
- Video production: commercials, social ads, product video, motion graphics, 3D
- Photography: product and corporate
- Marketing campaigns on Google, Meta and LinkedIn
- Graphic design: logos, print materials, brand assets

Clients work with one team for the entire pipeline rather than coordinating separate agencies for strategy, production and ads.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://syntaxstudio.no/): Overview of services, featured work and approach
- [Services](https://syntaxstudio.no/en/services): Full list of offerings, process and FAQ
- [Book a meeting](https://syntaxstudio.no/en/book): Free 30-minute intro call
- [About](https://syntaxstudio.no/en/about-us): Team and company background

## Selected work

- [Jønk](https://syntaxstudio.no/en/work/jonk): Full visual campaign for Oslo burger chain. 4K commercials, 50+ high-end product photos and ongoing social content
- [FCR](https://syntaxstudio.no/en/work/fcr): Promo video for MMA fighter Tamerlan Akhmadov competing under Full Contact Rumble in Sweden
- [Snatched](https://syntaxstudio.no/en/work/snatched): Promo video with custom 3D modeling and infographics for Norway's fastest-growing shapewear brand

## How to engage

Clients typically start by booking a free 30-minute intro call via the booking page. After the call, Syntax Studio sends a written proposal with scope, price and timeline. First deliverables for a standard project usually arrive within 1–2 weeks of project start.
